steps.title: Factor the equation
steps.content:
Move the left side to the right side and factor out $x-a$.
$$x-a=(x-a)(x-31)$$
$$0=(x-a)(x-31)-(x-a)$$
$$0=(x-a)(x-32)$$

steps.title: List the solutions
steps.content:
The factored equation is true when either factor is $0$.
$$x-a=0\quad\text{or}\quad x-32=0$$
$$x=a\quad\text{or}\quad x=32$$

steps.title: Match the statements
steps.content:
Statement I is included, statement II is not included, and statement III is included. Therefore the valid statements are I and III only.
The answer is B.
